title: Development of Tharurhat Area for Tribals
text:
Press Release:Press Information Bureau

Ministry of Tribal Affairs

Development of Tharurhat Area for Tribals

Posted On:
12 MAR 2026 4:40PM by PIB Delhi

Union Minister of State for Tribal Affairs Shri Durgadas Uikey informed Lok Sabha that
DhartiAabaJanjatiya Gram Utkarsh Abhiyan (DAJGUA) launched by the Hon’ble Prime Minister on October 2, 2024, aims to saturate infrastructural gaps, improve access to health, education, Anganwadi facilities, roads, drinking water, electricity and providing livelihood opportunities to
 tribal people of 63,843 villages
 in 549 districts and 2,911 blocks
 across 30 States/UTs
.

The DhartiAabaJanjatiya Gram Utkarsh Abhiyan (DAJGUA)period is from 2nd October, 2024 to 31st March, 2029. The
abhiyan'integrates
25 interventions
 across
17 Ministries
. Key multi-sectoral interventions include:

S. No.

Ministry

Activity

Mission Target (2024-2028)

1

Ministry of Rural Development (MoRD)

Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojna (PMAY)- Gramin (MoRD)

20 Lakhs pucca houses

2

Pradhan Mantri Gram Sadak Yojana PMGSY (MoRD)

25,000 Km Road

3

Ministry of Jal Shakti

Jal Jeevan Mission (JJM)

Every eligible village/Hamlet ~63000 villages

4

Ministry of Power

Revamped Distribution Sector Scheme - RDSS

Every unelectrified HH and unconnected public institutions (~ 2.35 lakh)

5

Ministry of New and Renewable Energy

New Solar Power Scheme- PM Surya

Every unelectrified HH and public institutions not covered through grid.

6

Ministry of Health and family Welfare

PM Ayushman Bharat Health Infrastructure Mission – PM ABHIM

1000 MMUs

7

Ministry of Women and Child Development

Anganwadi Centre- Poshan 2.0 (ICDS)

8000 Saksham AWC (2000 New AWC & 6000 upgradation)

8

DoSE&L, Ministry of Education

Samagra Shiksha Abhiyan (SSA)

1000 hostels

9

Ministry of AYUSH

National AYUSH Mission

700 PoshanVatikas in EMRS

10

Ministry of Communications

Universal Service Obligation Fund (USOF)

5252 villages

11

Ministry of Tourism

Responsible tourism (Swadesh Darshan)

1000 Home stays

12

Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship

Jan Shikshan Sansthan (JSS) Scheme

(i) Skilling Centres in tribal districts (ii) Training of 1000 VDVKs and tribal groups

13

Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare

Rashtriya Krishi Vikas Yojana (RKVY)

Sustainable agriculture support to FRA pattaholders (~ 2 lakh)

14

D/o Fisheries

Pradhan Mantri Matsya Sampada Yojana (PMMSY)

Support to tribal fishermen: 10,000 IFR and 1000 CFR

15

D/o Animal Husbandry and Dairying

National Livestock Mission

Livestock management support to 8500 IFR holders

16

Ministry of Panchayati Raj

Capacity building-Rashtriya Gram Swaraj Abhiyan (RGSA)

All Gram Sabhas and concerned officers at Subdivision, District and State level dealing with FRA

17

Ministry of Tribal Affairs

PMAAGY/ SCA to TD

100 TMMC - Mutli-purpose Marketing Centres

Upgradation of Ashram Schools/Govt. Schools & Hostels for Tribals

FRA Claim Support

CoC for Sickle Cell Disease in 17 states

***

RN/

(Release ID: 2238952)

Visitor Counter : 23
